diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,128 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono export that extends HonoBase and sets up default routing with SmartRouter combining RegExpRouter and TrieRouter.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions, Router
+- Simple note: Default router is SmartRouter wrapping [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter]
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base class implementing the core Hono application with get, post, use, on, route, mount, fetch, request, fire methods.
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, Hono, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, Env, Schema, getPath, mergePath, compose, COMPOSED_HANDLER
+- Simple note: Contains router abstraction, handler composition, middleware stack via compose, error/notFound handlers
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export for PatternRouter.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Thin export file, delegates to router.ts
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements PatternRouter that builds RegExp patterns from paths with support for parameterized routes like /:id and wildcards.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, emptyParams
+- Simple note: Converts path templates to compiled RegExp arrays; matches by sequential RegExp execution
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export for LinearRouter.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Thin export file, delegates to router.ts
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements LinearRouter using direct linear scanning of routes with support for named parameters and wildcard paths.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, emptyParams, ROUTES_LOOP, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, checkOptionalParameter
+- Simple note: Linear O(n) route matching with character-by-character parsing of path segments
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export for RegExpRouter including PreparedRegExpRouter for serialization.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, Matcher, StaticMap
+- Simple note: Provides both runtime matchable router and pre-compiled variant for Wasm/edge deployments
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements RegExpRouter that builds a trie internally and generates a single compiled regular expression for fast matching.
+- Names notice: RegExpRouter, Router, ParamIndexMap, Matcher, Match, UnsupportedPathError, Trie, HandlerData, StaticMap, PATH_ERROR, buildWildcardRegExp, findMiddleware, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes
+- Simple note: Two-phase: stores routes in trie, converts to single compiled RegExp with capture groups for matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines Matcher type and implements the match function used by RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerData, StaticMap, emptyParam, match, ParamIndexMap, Result, Router
+- Simple note: Generic match implementation that builds matchers on first call and caches them
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements PreparedRegExpRouter for pre-compiled routers that can serialize their structure for deployment in edge runtimes.
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, Router, Matcher, MatcherMap, StaticMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, RelocateMap
+- Simple note: Accepts pre-built matchers and relocateMap allows adding new routes dynamically to a fixed matcher structure
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class building a trie structure from route paths for RegExpRouter during matcher construction.
+- Names noticed: Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, regExpMetaChars
+- Simple note: Trie node with regex token children; inserts path tokens sorted by specificity to build efficient RegExp
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie class that processes paths into tokens and delegates to Node for trie construction.
+- Names noticed: Trie, Context, Node, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap
+- Simple note: Extracts groups and tokens from path strings, calls Node.insert to build matching structure, returns RegExp with replacement maps
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export for SmartRouter.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Thin export file, delegates to router.ts
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements SmartRouter that tries routers in sequence and commits to the first one that successfully matches.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, Result, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError
+- Simple note: Fallback router strategy; tests routers one by one, caches active router after first successful match
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export for TrieRouter.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Thin export file, delegates to router.ts
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements TrieRouter using a tree-based approach for route matching and parameter extraction.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Router, Node, Params, Result, checkOptionalParameter, METHOD_NAME_ALL
+- Simple note: Pure tree traversal with method tracking per node; supports named params and multiple matching handlers
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class for TrieRouter implementing tree traversal-based route matching with pattern support.
+- Names noticed: Node, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, emptyParams, hasChildren
+- Simple note: Tree node with pattern definitions; search uses queue-based traversal to find all matching handlers with params
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test suite providing common test scenarios for all router implementations (Basic Usage, Reserved words, Complex, Registration order, Multi match, etc.).
+- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, ParamIndexMap, Params, Router, skip
+- Simple note: Test framework that validates all routers against identical test cases with skip options per router type
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter including all common cases plus specific tests for Duplicate param name and Trailing slash behavior.
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Skips Duplicate param name self and Trailing slash GET /book/ tests due to PatternRouter differences
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter including all common cases plus specific tests for Multi match params, Capture regex trailing wildcard, and Trailing slash.
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Skips multi-match with params per handler and regex capture with trailing wildcard tests unsupported by LinearRouter
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for RegExpRouter including all common cases, Return value type, UnsupportedPathError (Ambiguous, Multiple handlers, static and dynamic), and Capture Group tests.
+- Names noticed: ParamStash, UnsupportedPathError, RegExpRouter
+- Simple note: Tests ambiguous route rejection, static/dynamic ordering constraints, complex capturing groups throw UnsupportedPathError
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for SmartRouter using common test suite with default RegExpRouter + TrieRouter combination.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Zero skips; uses both RegExpRouter and TrieRouter with fallback logic tested via common cases
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter using common test suite.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Zero skips; passes all common cases including complex patterns, multi-match, and fallback
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter Node class including all common cases plus Node-specific tests: Root Node behavior, parameter handling, wildcard matching, sort order, multi-match scenarios, and duplicate param handling.
+- Names noticed: Node
+- Simple note: Comprehensive node-level tests: basic insertion/search, reserved word handling, wildcard *, named params, regexp patterns, ALL method, trailing slash, duplicate params
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
I need to follow these steps: 1) Create bench-artifacts directory, 2) Read all listed files, 3) Write the document with all sections and the cross-file checklist.
